attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.STATUS_RESULT_CODE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.STATUS_RESULT_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.CREATED_PROGRAM_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES,
 (
 select HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES
 minus
 select HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_STATUSES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.HEADER_ID  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ODR_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_STATUSES)
